title: artemisia nitrosa var. subglabra
intro: Artemisia nitrosa var. subglabra, commonly known as wormwood, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family. It has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, due to its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimalarial properties. The health benefits of Artemisia nitrosa var. subglabra include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and relieve headaches, as well as its potential to help alleviate symptoms of malaria and other diseases. In herbal preparations, Artemisia nitrosa var. subglabra is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used as an ingredient in some traditional Chinese medicines.
